items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the computed availability/expiry status for portal queries. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or checks related to this requirement. The prior steps focus on creating resources and booking offers but do not demonstrate the necessary validation for the computed availability/expiry status, leading to an inconclusive result.
